series_metadata.series_title: Responses to RFP/RFI for custody services
series_metadata.series_description: Custodial banks submit detailed responses to the RFP/RFI for custody services published by the Treasurer. Copies of these responses are retained separately by the Trust department in a manner consistent with TOS Agency Series Number LEG-03 (Series Authorization Number 10900506).

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: two years expiration of contract which response RFP / RFI / RFQ was submitted. ; Electronic: two years expiration of contract which response RFP / RFI / RFQ was submitted
